name: Smart Powerr Corp.
summary: Smart Powerr Corp. (CREG) is a Nevada holding company operating through PRC subsidiaries. It provides waste energy recycling and energy efficiency solutions for energy-intensive industries in China using a Build-Operate-Transfer (BOT) model. Systems capture waste heat, pressure, and flue gas from manufacturing to generate low-cost electricity, reducing customer energy costs by 5–20%. The company is transitioning into an energy storage integrated solution provider targeting PV/wind stations, commercial complexes, and smart energy cities.
